response.raw:
Box bg #1E1E1E, pad 24, rad 12
  Col gap 20
    Text fs 24, weight bold, "Einstellungen"
    
    Col gap 16
      Label "Benutzername"
      Input bg #333, pad 12, rad 6
      
      Label "E-Mail"
      Input type email, bg #333, pad 12, rad 6
      
      Label "Sprache"
      Select bg #333, pad 12, rad 6
        Option "Deutsch"
        Option "English"
        Option "Español"
      
      Row gap 8, ver center
        Checkbox bg #333
        Text "Newsletter erhalten"
      
      Row gap 8, ver center  
        Checkbox bg #333
        Text "Benachrichtigungen aktivieren"
      
      Row gap 8, ver center
        Switch bg #333
        Text "Dunkelmodus"
        
      Row gap 12, hor right
        Button bg #4B5563, pad 12, rad 6, "Abbrechen"
        Button bg #3B82F6, pad 12, rad 6, "Speichern"
